normalized_output.problem_summary: Add *.json to .gitignore under docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/ to prevent large JSON artifacts from being committed.
normalized_output.edit_description: Add 'evidence/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/*.json' to the gitignore list to exclude large JSON files from version control.
normalized_output.expected_outcome: JSON files in evidence/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/ will be excluded from commit and pushed.
normalized_output.risk_notes: Ensure no other JSON files exist in that directory; if they do, they will be committed.
